title: Quist (Gordonian)
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
{{Youmay|a character from an early draft of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|Episode IV]]|[[Quist (disambiguation)|other uses of the word]]}}
'''Quist''' was one of three members of the underground resistance against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in [[Gordon]], on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]]. He worked with [[Occo]] and [[Datos]].

Quist provided [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]], [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]] and [[Annikin Starkiller]], together with [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|Threepio]] with a plan for getting offworld. He gave them badges and disks so they could masquerade as the crew of a [[Baltarian freighter]]. The two young [[Prince/Legends|princes]] would be hidden in [[microcase]]s and put into hibernation.

Quist's plan, however, turned out to be a trap. The Baltarian freighter was surrounded by Imperial troops and its [[Captain/Legends|captain]] was none other than [[Espaa Valorum|Valorum]], a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Knight. It was unclear if Quist was a double agent.

==Behind the scenes==
Quist remained identical to his earlier portrayal in the first draft. He was now operating on the world of [[Townowi]], which had replaced Aquilae.
